U.S. House of Representatives
COMMITTEE ON ETHICS

MEMBER/OFFICER/EMPLOYEE FINANCIAL DISCLOSURE EXTENSION REQUEST FORM

Name of Requestor: Rohit Khanna
Date: 2/14/2022
Employing Member/Committee/Office: CA-17

Financial Disclosure Statement Type: Annual (CY 2021) checked; Amendment not checked; New Employee not checked; Termination not checked.

The length of time for which extension is requested (check one): 30 days not checked; 60 days not checked; 90 days checked; Other not checked.

For Ethics Committee Use Only
Days granted: 90
Reason: blank

Your request for an extension of time in which to file the Financial Disclosure Statement (FD) referenced above is hereby granted. Your FD must be filed on or before 8/13/2022. The Ethics Committee may grant additional requests, which may not, in the aggregate, exceed 90 days from the original due-date. Please note that if the date listed in this paragraph is on a weekend and you intend to file using the paper form, your FD must be received by the Clerk of the House no later than the close of business on the last business day before this date or postmarked on or before that date.

Date: 2/28/2022
Chairman: blank
Ranking Member: blank

Copy to: Legislative Resource Center, B-81 CHOB
(This page will be publicly disclosed)

Received stamp: Legislative Resource Center; 2022 MAR 17 AM 10:50; Office of the Clerk, U.S. House of Representatives.
Last Updated 1/2022.
